name: Frosted Pecan Cuplets
recipeInstructions:
Combine butter and gradually add sugar. Beat in egg yolks and vanilla. Blend in flour and salt; chill. Shape teaspoonfuls of dough into rounds, dip in beaten egg white, then roll in pecans. Place on greased cookie sheets. Bake at 375°F for 5 minutes. Remove from oven and make a depression in the center of each cookie. Return to oven and bake an additional 10 minutes. Cool, then fill centers with tinted butter frosting. Makes 6 dozen.
To make tinted frosting, combine butter, powdered sugar, cream, and vanilla. Mix well. Divide mixture into two portions. Color one portion with red food coloring and the other with green food coloring.
